content.name: Juan Pablo Amorosi
content.title: AI Developer & Architect
content.bio: I am an AI Developer and Architect who operates from **first principles** to build full-cycle intelligence systems. My background is forged in the arena of execution, where resource efficiency and iteration speed are not just metrics, but a working philosophy.
description: I am an AI Developer and Architect who operates from **first principles** to build full-cycle intelligence systems. My background is forged in the arena of execution, where resource efficiency and iteration speed are not just metrics, but a working philosophy.

I turn constraints into strategic advantages, whether by reverse-engineering paid APIs with **proprietary scraping** or by designing AI architectures that use lightweight, low-cost models for specialized tasks.

More than a programmer, I am an **orchestrator of complex systems**. I translate abstract business visions into resilient and scalable software architectures. This portfolio is the chronicle of that methodology.
